creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lytboris from comment #3)

This is remain of the times I was trying to merge iXsystems Samba port and the FreeBSD one.

This still has to be implemented, as it provides additional value, but first libZFS has to be reliably build from the existing source code/ports tree.

So far I couldn't find reliable solution for this...
